title: Good: EUI-64 generation sets U/L bit correctly
description:
generate_eui64() (lora_l2.c:67-90) correctly sets the U/L bit (bit 1) and clears the multicast bit (bit 0) per IEEE EUI-64 semantics: 'eui64[0] = (eui64[0] | 0x02) & 0xFE'. The comment explains what each bit means.

This matches the IID derivation in ipv6_addr.c, ensuring address consistency.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:83-85
